commit.subject: LU-11774 test: wait to finish in racer's file_exec
commit.message:
LU-11774 test: wait to finish in racer's file_exec

In the test "file_exec.sh" of racer, the "cp" could be stuck and
cause different issues, this patch waits and checks its status.

Test-Parameters: trivial alwaysuploadlogs \
testlist=racer,racer,racer,racer,racer,racer,racer,racer,racer

Change-Id: Ibe1b39bf3fd63c82eb12060f7208182d3f673ce1
Signed-off-by: Hongchao Zhang <hongchao@whamcloud.com>
